    net-im/concord: Improve port

    - Add USE_LDCONFIG - port installs .so library.
    - Allow build both shared and static libraries at same time.
    - Prebuild examples.

    PR:             279553
    Approved by:    Souji Thenria <mail@souji-thenria.net>
